title: Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings No Loss Paint Brushes | 3 Brush Pack | 1", 1.5", 2"
features: No Bristle Loss for a hassle-free painting experience
Designed for use with all emulsion paints
Three brush pack in sizes 1", 1.5", and 2" for versatility
Flexible handle provides comfort during extended decorating sessions
Ideal for cutting in around light switches, plug sockets, and other interior areas
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! HARRIS SERIOUSLY GOOD WALLS & CEILING PAINT BRUSHES 3 PACK Contents 1 x 1 inch 1 x 1.5 inch 1 x 2 inch For Painting Smaller Wall & Ceiling Areas A step up from our Essentials walls and ceilings brush pack, this pack contains the paint brushes you need to tackle those smaller areas of walls and ceiling with Emulsion paint. Has a better paint pick up and gives a better finish compared to our Harris Essentials brush range Doing a Painting SaveSaveProject Team these brushes up with the Seriously Good 9" Walls & Ceilings Roller set and the Seriously Good 4" Walls & Ceilings Roller set Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range.
